name: hetz-haim-ordering-system
description: Unified entry for Railway / local production start

scripts.build: npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix client run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('client','dist');const dest=path.join('server','public');fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});"
